reviews.review_msg: Received 0 feedback on assignments throughout the whole course. Midterm included specific details that had no relevance to the course. During discussions he would interrogate students with extremely specific questions about readings that no one ever remembered. Very unclear grading criteria for all assignments. Hard marker.
